prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from frontier orbital energies. Method used: DFT with **b3lyp/def2-tzvp** (tier `standard`) in **PySCF**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` used as the input geometry. SCF converged: true; SCF cycles: 6. Tool did not report a software version or a live `.out` log path in the returned result.

Computed orbital energies: HOMO = **-7.6155818 eV**, LUMO = **-0.17986527 eV**. Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = **7.4357165 eV**. This is a computed Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an experimental excitation energy.

Warnings: no warnings field was returned by the tool result.

Reproducibility: `cli_invocation` returned by chemkit was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpluf82uyi/live.json`.

Integrity verdict: `integrity.trustworthy = true`. Provenance: computed.
